title: Caliper Commit Button
prompt:
Create a production-ready Caliper Commit Button using React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This is a deliberate publishing control: two small measurement jaws begin apart around a quiet status dot, then close together when the user commits a change. The label moves from Review change to Commit change, while a compact confirmation caption becomes visible. Place it in a light Bento composition with a #F4F5F6 surround, white panel, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 type, and #4A4A4F supporting text. Use cobalt as the single bright accent. Do not use a gradient on the card or rely on color alone for the committed state.

Use one semantic button with aria-pressed and an adjacent polite live region. Click, Enter, and Space must perform the same toggle. The target is at least 44px, with a visible 3px dark focus ring. Hover lifts the control 2px over 180ms and press compresses it 1px over 90ms. Close the jaws with a spring of stiffness 380 and damping 30; crossfade the label and caption over 160ms. The open and committed states need distinct text and icon geometry even when motion is disabled. Use local React state only: no timers, random values, browser storage, remote assets, or network calls.

At 320px keep the label readable on one line and allow the surrounding panel to shrink without clipping. In the large detail preview retain the compact control and generous whitespace. Keep tab order logical, AA contrast, and keyboard behavior native. Prefer transform and opacity animations, respect prefers-reduced-motion with an immediate update or a 120ms fade, and include complete TypeScript React client code plus a runnable pure CSS approximation with suggested HTML.

code.css: /* Suggested HTML: */ .uiwiki-caliper{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;min-height:48px;padding:0 16px;border:0;border-radius:16px;background:#111;color:#fff;font:800 14px system-ui;transition:transform 180ms ease}.uiwiki-caliper i{width:4px;height:16px;border-radius:4px;background:#2563eb;transition:transform 220ms cubic-bezier(.22,1,.36,1)}.uiwiki-caliper b{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff}.uiwiki-caliper[aria-pressed="true"] i:first-child{transform:translateX(5px)}.uiwiki-caliper[aria-pressed="true"] i:last-child{transform:translateX(-5px)}.uiwiki-caliper:hover{transform:translateY(-2px)}.uiwiki-caliper:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:3px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.uiwiki-caliper,.uiwiki-caliper i{transition:none}}

demoCode:
